# Runbooks

## Purpose
Use this skill to execute, verify, and improve operational runbooks.

## Triggers
- "runbook step"
- "incident procedure"
- "operational checklist"

## Outputs
- Runbook execution plan
- Preconditions and safety checks
- Verification steps
- Runbook improvement notes

## Example Prompts
- "Turn this recovery runbook into a safe step-by-step execution plan."
- "What prechecks should we run before restarting the Kafka consumer group?"
